summary: Highly praised recording with a noticeably stronger second set despite mixed source quality.
review: The reviewer gave the tape a full‑five stars, noting that the first half sounds like it comes from a different source while the second set is much clearer and more enjoyable. This suggests an uneven recording but a solid performance, especially in the latter part of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review is available; it rates the release 5 stars and highlights the second set as superior, indicating a strong overall impression despite source inconsistencies.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First set appears to be from a different (likely lower‑quality) source; second set sounds much clearer and better balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The second set outshines the first, giving the impression of an uneven performance or recording across the concert.
